no_changes_rationale:
No changes: feature already landed.

What is done
============
The Executions view feature described by ddx-726bc5f2 is already fully implemented
and merged into the base (59a4ece5). The implementation was committed as
fcb8a93c "feat: add Executions view for execute-bead bundles [ddx-726bc5f2]"
and merged via dde008ca "Merge bead ddx-726bc5f2 attempt 20260423T053812- into
main", both ancestors of the current base-rev.

Files present in the base that satisfy the AC:

  GraphQL / backend:
    cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql         (Execution types, queries)
    cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_executions.go
    cli/internal/server/graphql/executions_integration_test.go
    cli/internal/server/state_executions.go
    cli/internal/server/state_executions_test.go
    cli/internal/server/graphql/generated.go

  Frontend:
    cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/executions/+page.svelte
    cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/executions/+page.ts
    cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/executions/[executionId]/+page.svelte
    cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/executions/[executionId]/+page.ts
    cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/NavShell.svelte         (sidebar entry)
    cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/BeadDetail.svelte       (cross-link)
    .../sessions/+page.svelte, .../commits/+page.svelte                     (cross-links)
    cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/executions.spec.ts                     (Playwright)

Verification this pass
======================
  - `go build ./...`                                          → clean
  - `go test ./internal/server/ -run Execution`               → PASS
  - `go test ./internal/server/graphql/ -run Execution`       → PASS

Why this bead re-queued
=======================
The prior review recorded REVIEW:BLOCK citing "all AC items 1-9" as unmet, but
the review's own notes explain the error: the reviewer examined only the
`chore: add execution evidence` commit (which only adds a result.json evidence
file) rather than the feature commit fcb8a93c referenced in its own
result_rev. The review itself states: "the review should target that commit
or the full branch diff instead."

What a follow-up would need
===========================
Nothing on the code side — the feature is shipped. If anything, the review
tooling's diff-range selection should be fixed so it targets the feature
commit rather than the subsequent evidence chore commit. That is outside
the scope of this bead.

Committing a duplicate re-implementation of code that is already in the base
would be harmful: it would either conflict with the existing files or produce
a no-op commit. Returning no_changes is the correct outcome.
